title: Fault-Tolerant Distributed System Architecture
scenario: Design a fault-tolerant distributed system architecture for a large-scale, high-availability application. Ensure the architecture includes a load balancer, multiple redundant nodes, and automatic failover mechanisms. Generate a detailed system design document in standard technical report format. Ensure the output is under 500 words and includes clear section headings and concise diagrams.
constraints: Must include a detailed section on scalability and performance metrics
Must use UML or system design diagram notation

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the output adheres to all specified formatting and content constraints.
Judge the clarity and concision of the system design diagrams.
Check that the architecture includes necessary scalability and performance considerations.
